## RepeatDirective class

A directive that configures list rendering.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RepeatDirective<TSource = any> implements HTMLDirective, ViewBehaviorFactory, BindingDirective 
```
**Implements:** [HTMLDirective](./fast-element.htmldirective.md)<!-- -->, [ViewBehaviorFactory](./fast-element.viewbehaviorfactory.md)<!-- -->, [BindingDirective](./fast-element.bindingdirective.md)
